title: juncus articulatus var. fluitans
intro: Juncus articulatus var. fluitans, also known as floating rush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Juncaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections. Juncus articulatus var. fluitans is traditionally used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
